videos.headline: Snoop Dogg halts interview to make diving grab on kickoff
videos.description: Hip-hop legend Snoop Dogg stops his interview to catch a kickoff during the Miami (Ohio) vs. Fresno State bowl game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Snoop Dogg halts interview to make diving grab on kickoff) 2025/12/27 ESHEET
